description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in frontal range and pushes them back. Reduces hit enemies' ATK Spd by [15%->250] and M.DEF by [10%->30%] for [4 sec->15 sec]. Deals additional ??? M.DMG to Non-Hero enemies.
Deals ??? M.DMG to 2 enemies, and shackles them for [2 sec->6 sec]. Hit enemies will take ??? M.DMG over 6 sec and take [20%->30%] increased M.DMG for the duration of Skill.
Draws in nearby enemies towards the center 5 times and deals a total of ??? M.DMG. The last attack stuns enemies for [1 sec->3 sec]. Deals additional ??? M.DMG to Non-Hero enemies.

Increases Crit Chance by 150 and each hit inflicts [Curse of Lea] on the target for 10 sec. Targets inflicted with [Curse of Lea] have their Crit Chance reduced by [100->250] and ATK by [10%->25%] for the duration of Skill.

III.unified: Crit Chance Boost is increased by [75->50].

IV.unified: Crit Chance Boost is increased by [125->50].

dark.unified: Has a 20% chance of inflicting a 3 sec Shackle.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1] and the skill targets [all enemies->3 enemies].

dark.unified: Shackle duration is increased by [2 sec->1.5 sec].

light.unified: Target takes [15%->25%] increased M.DMG for 10 sec.
For every 1 target inflicted with [Curse of Lea], Maria's ATK increases by 10%. This effect can be stacked up max 5 times and is irremovable.

dark.unified: Reduces enemy M. Crit Resistance by [20%->25%] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Claw of Restriction] Increases DMG by 50% and increases M.Weakness of the affected enemy by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Area of Darkness] DMG is increased by {0}% and the last attack reduces the target's [M.DEF->P.DEF and M.DEF] by 30% for 7 sec.

[Black Wind] Every 10 sec, attacks enemies affected by [Curse of Lea->Black Wind], dealing M.DMG equal to 200% of ATK. Increases own ATK by {0}% for 20 sec per hit enemy. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.

dark.unified: Upon a Crit Hit, target's [Status Resistance->CC resistance] is reduced by [200->250] for 10 sec, and all Skill Cooldown, excluding the skill in use, is reduced by 2% each.

description.unified: Upon a Crit Hit, reduces Heal Rate of the target by [35%->50%] and increases own Crit DMG by {0}% for 10 sec. Crit DMG increase effect can be stacked up to max 20 times.

Summons the Soul of Lea's Messenger, Cocytus, dealing ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies in a straight line, knocking them back [far away] for 3 sec and inflicting 'Raven Catastrophe' for 10 sec. Targets inflicted with 'Raven Catastrophe' have their ATK reduced by 40%.

1.from: Reduces Heal Rate of enemies affected by Raven Catastrophe by 50%.
1.to: Reduces Heal Rate of the target inflicted with 'Raven Catastrophe' by 50%.
1.unified: Reduces Heal Rate of the target inflicted with 'Raven Catastrophe' by 50%.

2.from: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements to 3 times.
2.to: Reduces Skill Activation requirements to 3 times.
2.unified: Reduces Skill Activation requirements to 3 times.
